[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111 a
1 1111111 a
2 1111111 a
3 1111111 a
4 0001110 3
5 0000110 2
6 0100111 4
7 1110011 5

01 0000000 a
12 0100001 2
23 0000000 a
34 0001000 1
45 1010011 4
56 0100000 1
67 0001000 1
70 0000110 2 match 5

02 0100001 2
13 0100000 1
24 0001000 1
35 1010001 3
46 1110011 5 match 7
57 0101000 2
60 0001100 2
71 0000110 2 match 5

03 0100000 1
14 0001000 1
25 1010000 2
36 1010001 3
47 0110001 3
50 0001100 2
61 0000100 1
72 0000110 2 match 5

04 0000000 a
15 1010001 3
26 1010000 2
37 0011001 3
40 0000110 2 match 5
51 0000100 1
62 0000100 1
73 0000010 1

05 1010001 3
16 1110001 4
27 0011000 2
30 0001100 2
41 0000110 2 match 5
52 0100100 2
63 0000000 a
74 0000000 a

06 1110001 4
17 0111001 4
20 0001000 1
31 0000100 1
42 0100111 4 match 6
53 0100000 1
64 0001000 1
75 1000010 2

07 0110001 3
10 0001000 1
21 0000000 a
32 0000101 2
43 0100010 2
54 0001000 1
65 0000000 a
76 1000010 2
